data.content: Replaced all visible 'Human Action' labels with 'Escalations' across app-header.tsx (tab button + shortcut button), final-cut-view.tsx (heading + loading text), and wave-planner.tsx (readiness label). Internal identifiers (humanAction, finalcut, useHumanActionCount) unchanged. All quality gates pass: lint (0 errors), tsc, 2212 tests, build. Branch: feat/foolery-5c85-escalations, commit 1d7bed6c2ef9.
